title: juncus mollis
intro: Juncus mollis, also known as soft rush or soft jointed rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, commonly found in wet environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Juncus mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Juncus mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in poultices and compresses to harness its medicinal properties.
